_source: Tunable — single source of truth for the level-rule thresholds the engine fires on. HRV/RHR/sleep cutoffs follow the HRV-monitoring and sleep-consensus literature (Plews/Buchheit; Walsh et al. 2021). Workout load uses an uncoupled week-over-week ramp against the prior three-week baseline, reflecting the methodological critique of coupled ACWR (Impellizzeri et al. 2020). ACSM is a general exercise-science umbrella, not the source of these specific numbers.
